title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · State Clinic: Durable Execution
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops durable execution increment in a durable runbook and restartable workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
Compare agent versions by material outcome slices and investigate regressions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
